resultList.dtldesc: Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a spacious 3 BHK apartment in the prestigious Hiranandani Complex, a landmark residential development in the well-planned neighbourhood of Kharghar, Navi Mumbai. Currently under construction, this semi-furnished residence promises a modern, elevated lifestyle upon possession, combining luxury scale with a prime location.::::Property Specifications::This generous apartment offers a substantial super area of 1,800 sq. ft, featuring three well-designed bedrooms, two contemporary bathrooms, and two spacious balconies. Situated on the 10th floor of a towering 40-storey residential building, it is configured to receive ample natural light and ventilation while offering commanding views of the surroundings. The property is offered on a resale basis and is semi-furnished, providing the convenience of immediate move-in readiness post-completion while allowing the new owner the freedom to customise the final design elements and furnishings.::::Facilities::Residents of this notable complex benefit from a comprehensive suite of modern facilities expected of a premium development. The high-rise structure ensures seamless accessibility with high-speed lifts and reliable power backup for common areas. Security is a key feature, maintained through 24-hour surveillance and professional personnel deployment. Community amenities typically include access to a well-equipped gymnasium, a dedicated children's play area, a landscaped garden, and ample parking provision, all contributing to a comfortable and convenient integrated living environment.::::Locality::Kharghar is a highly-rated and strategically significant neighbourhood in Navi Mumbai, renowned for its superior connectivity and robust social infrastructure. The complex enjoys excellent access to the Pethpada Metro Station and the Kharghar Railway Station, significantly easing commuting across the region. The area is celebrated as an educational hub, with institutions such as the Convent of Jesus & Mary High School in close proximity. Essential services, including multi-speciality hospitals and major retail hubs like Little World Mall and Zudio, are conveniently located, establishing Kharghar as a desirable and complete address for families and professionals alike.
